overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates from open highways through elevated ramps and into dense urban canyons illuminated by vibrant neon signage, with heavy rainfall creating reflective wet road surfaces throughout the journey.

approaching roundabout interchange with palm tree island

row of palm trees lining the left side of the highway
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows
painted yellow curb marking the right edge of the roadway
tall street lighting pole with multiple lamps

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with first-person driving on a rain-soaked multi-lane highway at night. Palm trees line the left side while modern buildings rise in the distance. A blue sports car overtakes on the left at speed, and the vehicle approaches a roundabout interchange with a palm tree island visible ahead.

large pink neon circular sign becomes prominently visible

agents.ego_description: navigating curved ramp and roundabout, steering through the turn

entered.detail: large circular pink neon advertisement sign on building facade
concrete pillars and overpass structure of the highway system
illuminated advertising billboard with colorful graphics
landscaped island with palm trees in the center of the roundabout

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a curved highway ramp and roundabout, passing under elevated structures. The environment transitions from open highway to a more enclosed ramp system, with a large pink neon circular sign becoming visible on the right as cyberpunk-style signage begins to dominate the visual landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with guardrails and neon advertisements

events.description: passing under large highway overpass structure
navigating winding curve with illuminated guardrails

agents.ego_description: cruising along elevated highway, following the curved road geometry

tall concrete wall with vertical lines for noise reduction
dense collection of illuminated advertisements and holographic displays
massive concrete overpass with support pillars spanning the road

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway section with illuminated guardrails and concrete sound barriers. The road winds through a canyon of neon billboards and advertisements, passing under massive overpass structures. The environment is fully urban with no natural vegetation visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with heavy neon signage and underpasses

events.description: entering dense urban canyon with heavy neon signage
merging with traffic flow in multi-lane underpass

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense urban traffic, following a green sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: green sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: dense wall of colorful neon signs and holographic advertisements on building facades
enclosed highway underpass with concrete ceiling and walls
large industrial building with ventilation fans and metal panels
yellow and black striped warning barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a dense urban canyon with towering walls of neon signs and holographic advertisements. The vehicle drives through an enclosed underpass, following a green sedan through moderate traffic. The environment is fully enclosed with industrial buildings on the left and a cacophony of cyberpunk signage illuminating the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from an open, rain-soaked highway into the claustrophobic, neon-drenched canyons of a futuristic city. It begins on a multi-lane road lined with palm trees and distant buildings, where a blue sports car speeds past as the vehicle approaches a roundabout interchange. As the car navigates the curved ramps and passes under elevated structures, the natural greenery vanishes and is replaced by glowing cyberpunk signage, highlighted by a prominent pink neon circular sign. The scene then shifts onto an elevated highway section, winding through concrete sound barriers and massive overpasses beneath a canopy of illuminated billboards. Finally, the environment closes in completely as the vehicle enters a dense urban underpass, following a green sedan through traffic amidst towering walls of holographic advertisements and industrial buildings.
